summary: Set 9 Session 5 (re-audit): Routed the realignment audit document through both Gemini Pro and GPT-5.4 as the cross-provider re-audit per spec acceptance criteria. Both providers returned FULLY ALIGNED on independent reads. The combined close-out reliability + outsource-last operating-mode design is shipped and verified. Wrote docs/proposals/2026-05-01-combined-design-realignment-audit.md (recommended new dated doc over appending to original audit) with §1 D-1/D-2/D-3 evidence, §2 follow-up skip rationales (Session 4 was operator-skipped with written rationale per spec; both reviewers accepted skip rationales), §3 test count delta (606 → 676), §4 corrected open questions 2 and 7, §5 deferred items, §6 Gemini Pro verbatim verdict (FULLY ALIGNED, $0.0339), §7 GPT-5.4 verbatim verdict (FULLY ALIGNED, $0.1566), §8 synthesis with three completion stamps applied. Stamps applied to: (1) docs/proposals/2026-04-29-session-close-out-reliability.md, (2) docs/proposals/2026-04-30-combined-design-alignment-audit.md, (3) docs/proposals/2026-05-01-combined-design-realignment-audit.md. Authored change-log.md and session-005.md. Test suite: 676 passed in 56.07s (no regressions; doc-only changes this session). Aggregate Set 009 cross-provider verification cost: $0.7811 ($0.1910 S1 + $0.1453 S2 + $0.2543 S3 + $0.0000 S4 skipped + $0.1905 S5).
